hero.label: Refined Vegetarian Dining
hero.title: Pure Flavors From Nature
hero.subtitle: Hana offers a world-class vegetarian dining experience, where every dish is a masterpiece crafted from the finest ingredients.

intro.label: Our Expertise
intro.title: Refined Vegetarian Cuisine For Those Special Moments In Life
intro.description: At Hana, we believe plant-based cuisine can deliver a truly luxurious and emotional experience. Each ingredient is meticulously selected, each dish crafted with complete dedication — creating a genuine feast for the senses.

fresh.title: Fresh Produce
fresh.desc: Committed to using only hand-picked organic vegetables and herbs every day.

chef.title: Skilled Chefs
chef.desc: Our cooks bring deep expertise and a true passion for plant-based art.

quality.title: Best Quality
quality.desc: The highest standards in every step of preparation and presentation.

item1.name: Premium Truffle Mushroom
item1.desc: Truffle mushrooms, fresh garlic, green herbs

item2.name: Gourmet Fresh Rolls
item2.desc: Raw vegetables, rice noodles, organic hoisin

item3.name: Japanese Miso Tofu
item3.desc: Silken tofu, miso sauce, seasonal greens

service.title: Our Excellent Service And Top Quality Dishes Are Unmatched. Pick The Best.
service.desc: We know you want only the best for yourself. Come to Hana and discover true culinary art.

testimonials.quote: Hana is where I find true peace in every meal. The ambience is breathtaking, the food is incredible – an experience I will keep recommending to everyone I know.
testimonials.author: Minh Chau – Loyal Guest

newsletter.title: Stay Up To Date
newsletter.desc: Subscribe to receive exclusive offers, new seasonal menus and special events from Hana.

About.title: About Hana
About.subtitle: A journey to tranquility through plant-based cuisine.
About.philosophyText: At Hana, we believe every meal is a meditative experience. Food not only nourishes the body but also soothes the soul. Every ingredient is carefully selected to retain its inherent natural beauty.
About.passionText: Nature is an endless source of inspiration. From the spatial architecture to the food presentation, we always strive to recreate the rustic, tranquil beauty of plants and flowers in every moment you spend here.

Gallery.title: Gallery
Gallery.subtitle: Explore the peaceful moments and pure vegetarian dishes at Hana.
